seoTitle: Cockatoo vs Coen — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cockatoo and Coen. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cockatoo and Coen.
heading: Cockatoo vs Coen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cockatoo, Queensland and Coen, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cockatoo has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Coen (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cockatoo or Coen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cockatoo has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Coen scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cockatoo scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Coen scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cockatoo or Coen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cockatoo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
